templates.name: astro-docs
templates.description: Minimal Astro + markdown documentation site demonstrating zero-friction ACT generation via the @act-spec/plugin-astro integration.

templates.name: docusaurus-docs
templates.description: Large Docusaurus 3.x documentation site demonstrating ACT generation across a deep sidebar hierarchy.

templates.name: ecommerce-catalog
templates.description: Tiny Astro storefront fed by a 500-SKU catalog dataset, with ACT generated alongside via the programmatic adapter.

templates.name: eleventy-blog
templates.description: Flat chronological Eleventy 2.x blog demonstrating ACT generation via the @act-spec/plugin-eleventy plugin.

templates.name: hybrid-static-runtime-mcp
templates.description: Hybrid deployment combining a static ACT mount, a multi-tenant runtime mount, and an MCP bridge serving both to AI agents under one URI namespace.

templates.name: nextjs-marketing
templates.description: Next.js + Contentful + next-intl + React marketing site demonstrating multi-source ACT generation with localized content and component-extracted blocks.

templates.name: nextjs-saas-runtime
templates.description: Multi-tenant B2B SaaS workspace built on Next.js — serves ACT live from runtime route handlers, identity-scoped, cross-tenant safe.
